title: Measure B: School Facilities Bond
summary: Authorizes $260 million in bonds to repair, upgrade, and modernize local school buildings, including seismic safety and accessibility improvements, repaid through a property tax over 30 years.
pro_args: Fixes aging classrooms, leaking roofs, and unsafe facilities.
An independent citizens' oversight committee reviews all spending.
Keeps students learning locally instead of in temporary trailers.
con_args: Raises property taxes for the next 30 years.
There is no hard cap on administrative overhead.
Past bonds have not fully delivered on their promises.
